title: Huawei AP271E - WiFi7 indoor Dual Band AP, smart antenna, USB
category: Huawei / Wireless / Access Points / Huawei eKit
description: The Huawei eKitEngine AP271E is a compact and powerful indoor access point (AP) designed according to the Wi-Fi 7 (802.11be) standard, delivering fast and reliable wireless connectivity with a transmission speed of up to 3.57 Gbps . It supports simultaneous broadcasting on 2.4 GHz (2x2 MIMO) and 5 GHz (2x2 MIMO) frequencies, allowing smooth connectivity for multiple devices. The maximum number of connected users is 256. Thanks to its slim design, it is ideal for installations in hotels,… This access point is equipped with one 2.5 GE uplink port and four GE downlink ports , offering flexible connectivity options. It can be installed on a desk, wall, ceiling, or into a mounting box, allowing deployment in various environments. Its small dimensions and easy installation make the AP271E a great choice for quickly setting up an indoor wireless network Management and maintenance of the AP271E can be done locally via EasyWeb or a local controller (WAC) , or remotely through the HUAWEI eKit App and SNC platform. This makes the deployment and management of access points simple and efficient, significantly easing network operation and maintenance MU-MIMO technology enables simultaneous data transmission to multiple devices, maximizing radio spectrum utilization and improving network performance in high-density environments. Support for 160 MHz bandwidth and 4096-QAM modulation allows speeds of up to 688 Mbps (2.4 GHz) and 2.88 Gbps (5 GHz), providing fast and stable connectivity for all users Advanced security features include authentication and encryption using WPA3, WPA2, and…
specsSearch: Wireless features Maximum modulation 4096 QAM Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11b/g, 802.11ax, 802.11be MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 2880 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 688 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 23 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 23 Security WEP, WPA, WPA2, WPA3 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Built-in Roaming Yes Antenna gain [dBi] 5 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 1G/2.5Gbps + (4) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes USB ports 2.0 1 (Optional Ethernet Adapter for 2nd LAN) USB Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 802.3at PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 13 Power via connector/terminal 12V DC Physical characteristics Purpose Indoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 40 Weight [g] 405 Width [mm] 86 Height [mm] 175 Depth [mm] 45 Software Operating mode Access Point Features Leader AP IPv6 support Yes
